name: radio
description: Radio button with animated dot, label, description, and RadioGroup context for exclusive selection.

props.name: value
props.description: The value this Radio option represents; compared against RadioGroup value to determine selection

props.name: label
props.description: Primary text label rendered beside the radio button

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary descriptive text rendered below the label

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables this radio option independently of the group

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the radio item container

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<RadioGroup value={plan} onValueChange={setPlan}>
  <Radio value="free" label="Free" />
  <Radio value="pro" label="Pro" description="Unlimited usage" />
  <Radio value="enterprise" label="Enterprise" disabled />
</RadioGroup>

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Entire group disabled — useful for read-only survey responses
<RadioGroup value="agree" onValueChange={() => {}} disabled>
  <Radio value="agree" label="Agree" />
  <Radio value="disagree" label="Disagree" />
</RadioGroup>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Shipping method selection with descriptions
<RadioGroup value={shipping} onValueChange={setShipping}>
  <Radio value="standard" label="Standard" description="3–5 business days — free" />
  <Radio value="express" label="Express" description="1–2 business days — $9.99" />
  <Radio value="overnight" label="Overnight" description="Next business day — $24.99" />
</RadioGroup>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code: <Radio value="dark" label="Dark mode" description="Easier on the eyes" />
